title: Implement Version 33 Account System Without Failed Status

requirements.text: Implement a local authentication account system (signup, login, session management) using localStorage — similar to the version 33 approach — so users can register and log in without relying on Internet Identity. The system must store user profiles with INR/USDT balances and persist session state across page reloads.

quotes: version 33 jaisa account wala system kre do

acceptanceCriteria: Users can sign up with a username and password stored in localStorage
Users can log in with valid credentials and their session persists on page reload
New accounts are created with default INR and USDT balances
Logout clears the session from localStorage

requirements.text: Remove all 'Failed', 'Error', or failure-state messages and indicators from the login/signup flow and account system UI. Instead of showing failure notifications (e.g., 'Login failed', 'Signup failed', error toasts), silently handle errors or show only neutral/pending feedback to the user.
acceptanceCriteria: No toast, alert, or inline message displaying 'failed', 'error', or any failure state appears during login or signup
Invalid login attempts do not show an error message to the user
Duplicate signup attempts do not show a failure message
The UI gracefully handles edge cases without surfacing failure states

requirements.text: On the Login/Signup page (LoginPage.tsx), ensure the tab-based form UI continues to work correctly with the updated local auth system, including input validation and spinner feedback, but without any failure/error toast notifications or inline error messages.

quotes: version 33 jaisa account wala system kre do jo failed na bataye

acceptanceCriteria: Login and Signup tabs render correctly
Spinner/loading feedback still appears during form submission
No error or failure messages are shown at any point in the auth flow
Successful login navigates the user to the main app

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts or frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts
Do not remove or break the existing Internet Identity integration — local auth should coexist or be toggled as the primary auth method
Do not show any 'failed', 'error', or failure-related UI text anywhere in the account/auth flow
nonGoals: Changing the backend Motoko actor or data models
Modifying pages other than LoginPage and the local auth hook
